creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

The update of gpac-libgpac and gpac-mp4box in the ports tree happened at 
the same time. The only way to construct the problem mentioned in this 
PR is: 1) use a ports tree before r332289. 2) install gpac-libgpac. 3) 
update ports tree to current state. 4) install gpac-mp4box without 
updating the rest of the ports first. This is not a bug. Installed ports 
must be consistent with the ports tree in order to ensure subsequent 
installations and upgrades are also consistent.
